requirements.summary: Restore the frontend application to the state of Version 58, undoing all changes introduced in Version 59
acceptanceCriteria: The deployed application matches the functionality and code of Version 58.
All changes introduced in Version 59 are fully removed.
The frontend UI and behavior reflect Version 58.

file_operations.description: Restore the router configuration and route definitions to match Version 58 exactly, reverting any routing changes introduced in Version 59
Restore the landing page component composition and structure to Version 58, reverting any layout or content changes from Version 59
Restore the client login authentication flow and redirect logic to Version 58 implementation
Restore the client registration form and validation logic to Version 58 state
Restore the client dashboard UI, task creation form, and task list rendering to Version 58 functionality
Restore the partner dashboard task grouping and review request functionality to Version 58 state
Restore the internal staff portal authentication, admin claim, and user registration features to Version 58 implementation
Restore the partner registration portal form and role verification to Version 58 state
Restore the partner information page content and layout to Version 58
Restore the admin user management dashboard to Version 58 state, reverting any changes to user list rendering or grouping logic
Restore the asistenmu task management dashboard and delegation form integration to Version 58 functionality
Restore the finance dashboard layanan pagination, creation forms, and top-up management to Version 58 state
Restore the internal dashboard composition and section layout to Version 58 implementation
Restore the header navigation links and mobile menu to Version 58 state
Restore the footer links and layout to Version 58 implementation
Restore the hero section content, CTA buttons, and image to Version 58 state
Restore the service tier cards content, pricing, and accordion behavior to Version 58
Restore the task card component structure, status badges, and action buttons to Version 58 implementation
Restore the delegation form fields, partner search logic, and submission handling to Version 58 state
Restore the support process section content to Version 58
Restore the timely delivery marketing section content to Version 58
Restore the conversion statement section content to Version 58
Restore the join team CTA section to Version 58 state
Restore the closing section content to Version 58
Restore the dashboard layout wrapper to Version 58 implementation
Restore the authenticated app layout to Version 58 state
Restore the public layout wrapper to Version 58 implementation
Restore all TanStack Query hooks, mutations, and query keys to Version 58 implementation, reverting any API call changes
Restore the actor initialization and authentication logic to Version 58 state
Restore the Internet Identity authentication context and hook to Version 58 implementation
Restore the global CSS custom properties, Tailwind directives, and color tokens to Version 58 state
Restore the Tailwind configuration including theme extensions, colors, and plugins to Version 58
Restore the application entry point and provider wrapping to Version 58 state
Restore the HTML shell to Version 58 if any changes were made in Version 59
Restore the smooth scroll utility function to Version 58 implementation
Restore the URL parameter utility functions to Version 58 state
